creator: bz@FreeBSD.org
text:
Beware that TAHI is not updated anymore.   For this test it is probably good enough however still.

If you can give me a few days, I'll at least give you some feedback on the patch.  There were things that bugged me.

However if it addresses your immediate need maybe getting it in and then refining might be better (though I generally prefer not to do that)?
